trans-unit.resname: You might create a sequence of challenges where players won't be able to access a new game or challenge until they obtain a key from previous activity. For this purpose, you might set up an access code as well as a message that will be displayed to players when they reach a fixed percentage of correct answers, which they can use as a password for a new challenge or a following activity.
trans-unit.source: You might create a sequence of challenges where players won't be able to access a new game or challenge until they obtain a key from previous activity. For this purpose, you might set up an access code as well as a message that will be displayed to players when they reach a fixed percentage of correct answers, which they can use as a password for a new challenge or a following activity.
trans-unit.target: Podeu crear un itinerari de reptes on els jugadors no podran accedir a un nou joc o repte fins que no obtinguin una clau en una activitat anterior. Per a aquest propòsit, podeu establir un codi d'accés, així com un missatge que es pugui mostrar als jugadors quan tinguin un percentatge fix d'encerts i que s'utilitzi com a contrasenya per a un nou repte o una activitat següent.

trans-unit.resname: Display a message or password upon reaching the defined objective

trans-unit.source: Act as a highly experienced teacher.

trans-unit.resname: The format requires a question (non-empty string), a solution (0 or 1), a suggestion (mandatory, can be empty), and feedback (mandatory, can be empty).
trans-unit.source: The format requires a question (non-empty string), a solution (0 or 1), a suggestion (mandatory, can be empty), and feedback (mandatory, can be empty).
trans-unit.target: El format requereix una pregunta (cadena no buida), una solució (0 o 1), una suggerència (obligatòria, pot estar buida), i comentaris (obligatoris, poden estar buits).

trans-unit.resname: Does water boil at 100 degrees Celsius?
trans-unit.source: Does water boil at 100 degrees Celsius?

trans-unit.resname: any digit from 0 to 3 for single-choice (up to 4 options)
trans-unit.source: any digit from 0 to 3 for single-choice (up to 4 options)
trans-unit.target: qualsevol dígit de 0 a 3 per a una sola elecció (fins a 4 opcions)

trans-unit.resname: any combination of A-D for multiple-choice (up to 4 options).

trans-unit.source: Neither the word nor the definition must contain #. The word must have a maximum of 14 letters and must not contain spaces.
trans-unit.target: Ni la paraula ni la definició han de contenir #. La paraula ha de tenir un màxim de 14 lletres i no ha de contenir espais.

trans-unit.resname: There is no query to send to the assistant.

trans-unit.source: You must return only the questions without numbering and without classification or bullet points
trans-unit.target: Només has de retornar les preguntes sense numerar i sense classificació ni punts

trans-unit.source: The questions could not be generated
trans-unit.target: No s'han pogut generar les preguntes

trans-unit.resname: Generate 10 words followed by their definitions, separated by #. Do not include the # character in either the word or the definition.
trans-unit.source: Generate 10 words followed by their definitions, separated by #. Do not include the # character in either the word or the definition.
trans-unit.target: Genera 10 paraules amb les seves definicions, separades per #. No incloguis el caràcter # ni a la paraula ni a la definició.

trans-unit.resname: Generate 30 words and their definitions separated by #.
trans-unit.source: Generate 30 words and their definitions separated by #.
trans-unit.target: Genera 30 paraules i les seves definicions separades per #.

trans-unit.resname: Create 10 multiple-choice questions with 2 to 4 options. Start with the correct solution (0, 1, 2, or 3), followed by the question and each option, all separated by #.
trans-unit.source: Create 10 multiple-choice questions with 2 to 4 options. Start with the correct solution (0, 1, 2, or 3), followed by the question and each option, all separated by #.
trans-unit.target: Crea 10 preguntes d'elecció múltiple amb 2 a 4 opcions. Comença amb la solució correcta (0, 1, 2 o 3), seguida de la pregunta i cadascuna de les opcions, tot separat per #.

trans-unit.resname: Generate 10 multiple-choice questions. Provide the correct answer as letters (e.g., A, AB), followed by the question and the options, all separated by #.
trans-unit.source: Generate 10 multiple-choice questions. Provide the correct answer as letters (e.g., A, AB), followed by the question and the options, all separated by #.
trans-unit.target: Genera 10 preguntes de resposta múltiple. Proporciona la resposta correcta amb lletres (ex. A, AB), seguida de la pregunta i les opcions, tot separat per #.

trans-unit.resname: Create 5 solution words followed by 3 to 9 clues that describe each one. Separate each clue with #.
trans-unit.source: Create 5 solution words followed by 3 to 9 clues that describe each one. Separate each clue with #.
trans-unit.target: Crea 5 paraules de solució seguides de 3 a 9 pistes que descriguin cadascuna. Separa cada pista amb #.

trans-unit.resname: Provide 4 elements for each of these groups: carnivores, 0, and herbivores, 1. Separate the group number and the element using the symbol #.
trans-unit.source: Provide 4 elements for each of these groups: carnivores, 0, and herbivores, 1. Separate the group number and the element using the symbol #.
trans-unit.target: Proporciona 4 elements per a cadascun d’aquests grups: carnívors, 0, i herbívors, 1. Separa el número del grup i l’element amb el símbol #.

trans-unit.resname: Generate 10 true or false questions. Each question must include the solution (0 = false, 1 = true), a suggestion, and feedback, all separated by #. Additionally, the feedback must not explicitly indicate whether the response is correct or incorrect
trans-unit.source: Generate 10 true or false questions. Each question must include the solution (0 = false, 1 = true), a suggestion, and feedback, all separated by #. Additionally, the feedback must not explicitly indicate whether the response is correct or incorrect
trans-unit.target: Genera 10 preguntes de vertader o fals. Cada pregunta ha d’incloure la solució (0 = fals, 1 = vertader), una suggerència i una retroalimentació, tot separat per #. A més, la retroalimentació no ha d’indicar explícitament si la resposta és correcta o incorrecta

trans-unit.resname: Generate 10 questions. The 'Solution' can be 0/1 for True/False, 0-3 for single-choice, or A-D (or combinations) for multiple-choice. Then provide the question and the answer options (2 to 4), all separated by '#'.
trans-unit.source: Generate 10 questions. The 'Solution' can be 0/1 for True/False, 0-3 for single-choice, or A-D (or combinations) for multiple-choice. Then provide the question and the answer options (2 to 4), all separated by '#'.
trans-unit.target: Genera 10 preguntes. La "Solució" pot ser 0/1 per a vertader/fals, 0-3 per a una sola opció, o A-D (o combinacions) per a resposta múltiple. A continuació, proporciona la pregunta i les opcions de resposta (de 2 a 4), tot separat per '#'.

trans-unit.resname: Provide only one ordered list of steps or items, each separated by '#'.
trans-unit.source: Provide only one ordered list of steps or items, each separated by '#'.
trans-unit.target: Proporciona només una llista ordenada de passos o elements, cadascun separat per '#'.

trans-unit.resname: Generate 10 words followed by their definitions, separated by #. Do not include the # character in either the word or the definition
trans-unit.source: Generate 10 words followed by their definitions, separated by #. Do not include the # character in either the word or the definition
trans-unit.target: Genera 10 paraules seguides de les seves definicions, separades per #. No incloguis el caràcter # ni a la paraula ni a la definició

trans-unit.resname: Create activities in which students are given a definition and they have to guess the word that starts with a letter or contains a letter.

trans-unit.resname: You must indicate the ID. It can be a word, a phrase or a number of more than four characters. You will use this ID to mark the activities covered by this progress report. It must be the same in all iDevices of a report and different in each report.
trans-unit.source: You must indicate the ID. It can be a word, a phrase or a number of more than four characters. You will use this ID to mark the activities covered by this progress report. It must be the same in all iDevices of a report and different in each report.
trans-unit.target: Cal indicar l'identificador (ID). Pot ser una paraula, una frase o un nombre de més de quatre caràcters. Utilitzareu aquest identificador per marcar les activitats d'aquest informe de progrés. Ha de ser el mateix en tots els iDevices d'un mateix informe i diferent al dels altres informes.

trans-unit.resname: Click here to toggle between Word starts with... and Word contains...
trans-unit.source: Click here to toggle between Word starts with... and Word contains...

trans-unit.source: Please create at least one card

trans-unit.resname: At least one image has no description, are you sure you want to continue without including it? Without it the image may not be accessible to some users with disabilities, or to those using a text browser, or browsing the Web with images turned off.
trans-unit.source: At least one image has no description, are you sure you want to continue without including it? Without it the image may not be accessible to some users with disabilities, or to those using a text browser, or browsing the Web with images turned off.
trans-unit.target: Almenys una imatge no té descripció, estàs segur que vols continuar sense incloure-la? Sense ella, la imatge pot no ser accessible per a alguns usuaris amb discapacitats, o per a aquells que utilitzen un navegador de text, o que naveguen per la Web amb les imatges desactivades.

trans-unit.resname: The report identifier must have at least 5 characters
trans-unit.source: The report identifier must have at least 5 characters

trans-unit.resname: Slide to reveal the differences between the images.
trans-unit.source: Slide to reveal the differences between the images.

trans-unit.resname: Both images should have a similar or proportional size.
trans-unit.source: Both images should have a similar or proportional size.

trans-unit.source: Do you want to delete this activity?

trans-unit.source: The case study must have at least one activity

trans-unit.resname: You must provide the text for each activity
trans-unit.source: You must provide the text for each activity

trans-unit.resname: Read the instructions and click on a trial when you're ready to play.

trans-unit.target: Llegeix les instruccions i fes clic en una prova quan estiguis preparat per jugar.

trans-unit.resname: You've completed all the trials! You can now complete the game.
trans-unit.source: You've completed all the trials! You can now complete the game.
trans-unit.target: Has completat totes les proves! Ara pots completar el joc.

trans-unit.resname: You made it! You can restart to play again.
trans-unit.source: You made it! You can restart to play again.
trans-unit.target: Ho has fet! Pots reiniciar el joc.

trans-unit.resname: Time Over. Please restart to try again.
trans-unit.source: Time Over. Please restart to try again.
trans-unit.target: Temps esgotat. Reinicia per tornar a provar.
Ho sento. La solució no és bona.

trans-unit.resname: You solved this trial! Please select another one.
trans-unit.source: You solved this trial! Please select another one.
trans-unit.target: Has resolt aquest repte! Selecciona'n un altre.

trans-unit.resname: This will restart the game and reset its starting time. Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.source: This will restart the game and reset its starting time. Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.target: Això reiniciarà el joc i restablirà el seu temps d'inici. Vols continuar?

trans-unit.resname: You must complete all the trials before facing the final challenge.
trans-unit.source: You must complete all the trials before facing the final challenge.
trans-unit.target: Has de completar totes les proves abans del repte final.

trans-unit.resname: Complete the trial. Write the solution.
trans-unit.source: Complete the trial. Write the solution.
trans-unit.target: Completa la prova. Escriu la solució.

trans-unit.resname: Please add at least one trial.
trans-unit.source: Please add at least one trial.

trans-unit.resname: You can only add ten trials to a challenge.
trans-unit.source: You can only add ten trials to a challenge.
trans-unit.target: Només es poden afegir deu proves a un repte.

trans-unit.resname: Create escape room type activities in which players will have to complete trials before solving the final challenge.
trans-unit.source: Create escape room type activities in which players will have to complete trials before solving the final challenge.
trans-unit.target: Crea activitats del tipus Joc d'escapada en les quals els jugadors hauran de superar les proves abans de resoldre el repte final.

trans-unit.resname: Solve all the trials and complete the final challenge.
trans-unit.source: Solve all the trials and complete the final challenge.
trans-unit.target: Resol totes les proves i completa el repte final.

trans-unit.source: Please provide the ID of this progress report

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want clear all form fields?

trans-unit.resname: You can use a checklist as a structured and easy way to understand the suggested activities in this educational resource. It will be a useful instrument for student self-assessment, allowing to monitor the completed activities.
trans-unit.source: You can use a checklist as a structured and easy way to understand the suggested activities in this educational resource. It will be a useful instrument for student self-assessment, allowing to monitor the completed activities.
trans-unit.target: Pots utilitzar una llista de verificació per tenir sistematitzades les activitats suggerides en el recurs educatiu. Serà un instrument útil per a l'autoavaluació de l'alumnat, ja que permetrà el seguiment de les activitats que es duguin a terme.

trans-unit.resname: Complete the checklist ticking the boxes for all finished activities.
trans-unit.source: Complete the checklist ticking the boxes for all finished activities.
trans-unit.target: Completa la llista de verificació marcant les caselles de totes les activitats finalitzades.
(*) Les cel·les admeten text amb format

trans-unit.source: Indicate a title for the checklist
trans-unit.target: Indica un títol per a la llista de comprovació

trans-unit.resname: No empty items can be left

trans-unit.source: Enter the text for the drop-down activity in the drop-down field either by pasting the text from another source or by typing it directly into the field. To select which words to choose, double-click on a word to select it and click on the button below.

trans-unit.resname: Type or paste the text for the fill-in-the-blank activity into the field. Select the words and use the button below to hide them. You can define more than one possible answer using vertical bars to surround and separate them. E.g.: |dog|cat|bird|
trans-unit.source: Type or paste the text for the fill-in-the-blank activity into the field. Select the words and use the button below to hide them. You can define more than one possible answer using vertical bars to surround and separate them. E.g.: |dog|cat|bird|
trans-unit.target: Escriviu o enganxeu el text de l'activitat d'omplir espais en blanc al camp. Seleccioneu les paraules i utilitzeu el botó de sota per ocultar-les. Podeu definir més d'una resposta possible utilitzant barres verticals per envoltar-les i separar-les. P. ex.: |gos|gat|ocell|

trans-unit.resname: If unchecked, a small number of spelling and capitalization errors will be accepted. If checked, no spelling or capitalization errors will be accepted. Example: If the correct answer is Elephant and it says elephant or Eliphant, both will be considered as "close enough" by the algorithm, as there is only one spelling error, even if "Check capitalization" is checked. If the case check is disabled in this example, the lowercase letter e is not considered an error and eliphant will also be accepted. If "Strict qualification" and "Check capitalization" are enabled, the only correct answer is "Elephant". If only "Strict qualification" is enabled and "Check capitalization" is not, "elephant" will also be accepted.
trans-unit.source: If unchecked, a small number of spelling and capitalization errors will be accepted. If checked, no spelling or capitalization errors will be accepted. Example: If the correct answer is Elephant and it says elephant or Eliphant, both will be considered as "close enough" by the algorithm, as there is only one spelling error, even if "Check capitalization" is checked. If the case check is disabled in this example, the lowercase letter e is not considered an error and eliphant will also be accepted. If "Strict qualification" and "Check capitalization" are enabled, the only correct answer is "Elephant". If only "Strict qualification" is enabled and "Check capitalization" is not, "elephant" will also be accepted.
trans-unit.target: Si no està seleccionada, es permetrà un petit marge d’error en ortografia i majúscules. Si està seleccionada, no s’acceptarà cap error d’aquest tipus. Exemple: si la resposta correcta és “Apòstol” i s’introdueix “apòstol” o “Apostol”, totes dues es consideraran “suficientment properes” per a l’algoritme, ja que només contenen un petit error ortogràfic, fins i tot si l’opció “Comprovar majúscules” està activada. Si la verificació de majúscules està desactivada, la lletra inicial en minúscula no es comptarà com a error, i també s’acceptarà “apostol”. En canvi, si estan activades tant “Qualificació estricta” com “Comprovar majúscules”, l’única resposta correcta serà “Apòstol”. Si només s’activa “Qualificació estricta” i no es comproven les majúscules, també s’acceptarà “apòstol”.

trans-unit.resname: If this option is checked, answers submitted with case differences will be marked as incorrect.
trans-unit.source: If this option is checked, answers submitted with case differences will be marked as incorrect.
trans-unit.target: Si aquesta opció està seleccionada, les respostes enviades amb diferències de majúscules seran marcades com a incorrectes.

trans-unit.resname: Insert a GeoGebra activity from www.geogebra.org. It requires an Internet connection.
trans-unit.source: Insert a GeoGebra activity from www.geogebra.org. It requires an Internet connection.
trans-unit.target: Insereix una activitat de GeoGebra des de www.geogebra.org. Requereix connexió a Internet.

trans-unit.resname: The button will only be displayed when exporting as SCORM and while editing in eXeLearning.
trans-unit.source: The button will only be displayed when exporting as SCORM and while editing in eXeLearning.
trans-unit.target: El botó només es mostrarà quan s'exporta com a SCORM i mentre s'edita a eXeLearning.

trans-unit.resname: Provide a valid GeoGebra URL or activity ID.
trans-unit.source: Provide a valid GeoGebra URL or activity ID.
trans-unit.target: Proporciona un URL o ID d'activitat GeoGebra vàlid.
Si us plau, escriviu el text del botó.

trans-unit.resname: Please provide the definition of the word or phrase
trans-unit.source: Please provide the definition of the word or phrase
trans-unit.target: Proporciona la definició de la paraula o frase

trans-unit.resname: Please provide one word or phrase
trans-unit.source: Please provide one word or phrase

trans-unit.resname: This video is not currently available
trans-unit.source: This video is not currently available
trans-unit.target: Aquest vídeo no està disponible actualment

trans-unit.resname: You have to complete the question
trans-unit.source: You have to complete the question

trans-unit.resname: Please type or paste a valid URL.
trans-unit.source: Please type or paste a valid URL.
trans-unit.target: Escriviu o enganxeu un URL vàlid.

trans-unit.resname: You have to type a text in the editor
trans-unit.source: You have to type a text in the editor
trans-unit.target: És necessari escriure el text amb l'editor

trans-unit.resname: Create activities where, given a definition, students complete the word by filling in the missing letters.
trans-unit.source: Create activities where, given a definition, students complete the word by filling in the missing letters.
trans-unit.target: Crea activitats on, donada una definició, els estudiants completin la paraula omplint les lletres que falten.

trans-unit.resname: No lives, 0 to 10 score, right/wrong answers counter... A more educational context.
trans-unit.source: No lives, 0 to 10 score, right/wrong answers counter... A more educational context.
trans-unit.target: Sense vides, puntuació de 0 a 10, comptador d'encerts/desencerts... Un context més educatiu.

trans-unit.resname: Just like a game: Aim for a high score (thousands of points) and try not to lose your lives.
trans-unit.source: Just like a game: Aim for a high score (thousands of points) and try not to lose your lives.
trans-unit.target: Igual que un joc: intenta obtenir una puntuació alta (milers de punts) i no perdre vides.

trans-unit.resname: No score and no lives. You have to answer right to get some information (a feedback).
trans-unit.source: No score and no lives. You have to answer right to get some information (a feedback).
trans-unit.target: Sense puntuació ni vides. Has de respondre bé per obtenir informació (retroalimentació).

trans-unit.resname: and information that will be very useful
trans-unit.source: and information that will be very useful
trans-unit.target: i informació que serà molt útil
Fes clic a una targeta. Intents: %s

trans-unit.resname: No more attempts left. Please answer the question.
trans-unit.source: No more attempts left. Please answer the question.
trans-unit.target: No queden més intents. Si us plau, respon la pregunta.

trans-unit.resname: You must upload or indicate the valid URL of an image
trans-unit.source: You must upload or indicate the valid URL of an image
trans-unit.target: Has de pujar o indicar l'URL vàlid d'una imatge

trans-unit.resname: You have to complete all the selected options
trans-unit.source: You have to complete all the selected options
trans-unit.target: Cal que completis totes les opcions seleccionades

trans-unit.resname: Are you sure you want to continue without including an image description? Without it the image may not be accessible to some users with disabilities, or to those using a text browser, or browsing the Web with images turned off.
trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to continue without including an image description? Without it the image may not be accessible to some users with disabilities, or to those using a text browser, or browsing the Web with images turned off.
trans-unit.target: Estàs segur que vols continuar sense incloure una descripció de la imatge? Sense aquesta descripció, la imatge pot no ser accessible per a alguns usuaris amb discapacitat, per a aquells que utilitzen un navegador de text o naveguen amb les imatges desactivades.

trans-unit.resname: Create interactive challenges in which students progressively reveal sections of a concealed image and then choose the correct answer based on the visual clues.
trans-unit.source: Create interactive challenges in which students progressively reveal sections of a concealed image and then choose the correct answer based on the visual clues.
trans-unit.target: Crea reptes interactius en els quals els estudiants descobreixen progressivament seccions d'una imatge amagada i després escullen la resposta correcta basant-se en les pistes visuals.

trans-unit.resname: Reveal the hidden image and choose the right answer.
trans-unit.source: Reveal the hidden image and choose the right answer.
trans-unit.target: Descobreix la imatge amagada i tria la resposta correcta.

trans-unit.resname: You used one clue. You can only get %s points.
trans-unit.source: You used one clue. You can only get %s points.
trans-unit.target: Has utilitzat una pista. Només podeu obtenir %s punts.

trans-unit.resname: You already used all the clues. You can only get %s points.
trans-unit.source: You already used all the clues. You can only get %s points.
trans-unit.target: Ja has utilitzat totes les pistes. Només podeu obtenir %s punts.

trans-unit.resname: Create activities in which the players, with some clues, will have to guess a character, an object or the solution to a problem.
trans-unit.source: Create activities in which the players, with some clues, will have to guess a character, an object or the solution to a problem.
trans-unit.target: Crea activitats en les quals el jugadors, amb algunes pistes, hauran de descobrir un personatge, un objecte, o una solució a problema.

trans-unit.resname: Use the clues to guess the hidden answer for each question.
trans-unit.source: Use the clues to guess the hidden answer for each question.
trans-unit.target: Utilitza les pistes per descobrir la resposta oculta per a cada pregunta.

trans-unit.resname: Choose files or drag them here.
trans-unit.source: Choose files or drag them here.

trans-unit.resname: Click on Save when you finish
trans-unit.source: Click on Save when you finish

trans-unit.target: La vostra portada interactiva de vídeo

trans-unit.resname: Write a text. You can add lists, links...
trans-unit.source: Write a text. You can add lists, links...
trans-unit.target: Escriu un text. Pots afegir llistes, enllaços...

trans-unit.resname: Add an image with description (alternative text).
trans-unit.source: Add an image with description (alternative text).
trans-unit.target: Afegeix una imatge amb una descripció (text alternatiu).

trans-unit.resname: Write a question and some answers. Don't forget to choose the right one.
trans-unit.source: Write a question and some answers. Don't forget to choose the right one.
trans-unit.target: Escriu una pregunta i algunes respostes. No t'oblidis de triar la correcta.

trans-unit.resname: Write a question and some answers. You can select more than one right answer.
trans-unit.source: Write a question and some answers. You can select more than one right answer.
trans-unit.target: Escriu una pregunta i algunes respostes. Pots triar més d'una resposta correcta.

trans-unit.resname: Write a text and strike through the words to complete. Check the spelling. It's case sensitive.
trans-unit.source: Write a text and strike through the words to complete. Check the spelling. It's case sensitive.
trans-unit.target: Escriu un text i ratlla les paraules a completar. Comprova l’ortografia. Es distingeixen majúscules i minúscules.

trans-unit.resname: Write a text and strike through the words to complete. A dropdown menu (SELECT) will be displayed where those words are. You can also add more options.
trans-unit.source: Write a text and strike through the words to complete. A dropdown menu (SELECT) will be displayed where those words are. You can also add more options.
trans-unit.target: Escriu un text i ratlls les paraules a completar. Es mostrarà un menú desplegable (SELECCIONA) on es trobaran aquestes paraules. També pots afegir més opcions.

trans-unit.resname: Write some instructions and add pairs in the right order.
trans-unit.source: Write some instructions and add pairs in the right order.
trans-unit.target: Escriu algunes instruccions i afegeix parelles en l'ordre correcte.

trans-unit.resname: Write the wording and add elements to the list (in the right order).
trans-unit.source: Write the wording and add elements to the list (in the right order).
trans-unit.target: Escriu el text i afegeix elements a la llista (en l'ordre correcte).

trans-unit.resname: Write the text to be shown
trans-unit.source: Write the text to be shown

trans-unit.resname: Strike through the words to complete. It's case sensitive.
trans-unit.source: Strike through the words to complete. It's case sensitive.
trans-unit.target: Ratlla les paraules a completar. Es distingeixen majúscules i minúscules.

trans-unit.resname: You can add more options to the dropdown lists (optional)
trans-unit.source: You can add more options to the dropdown lists (optional)
trans-unit.target: Pots afegir més opcions a les llistes desplegables (opcional)

trans-unit.resname: Fill in at least two pairs.
trans-unit.source: Fill in at least two pairs.

trans-unit.resname: Provide an alternative text for the image (describe the image).
trans-unit.source: Provide an alternative text for the image (describe the image).
trans-unit.target: Inclou un text alternatiu (descripció de la imatge).

trans-unit.resname: Add at least two elements to the list.
trans-unit.source: Add at least two elements to the list.
trans-unit.target: Afegeix almenys dos elements a la llista.

trans-unit.source: Do not show this message again

trans-unit.source: All the slides have been deleted.

trans-unit.source: The YouTube API might have changed.

trans-unit.source: The slide can't start in that second (zero).
trans-unit.target: La diapositiva no pot començar en aquell segon (zero).

trans-unit.source: The video is not that long. Check the start/end time.
trans-unit.target: El vídeo no és tan llarg. Comprova l'hora d'inici/final.

trans-unit.source: Set the time for the slide to be shown

trans-unit.source: If you don't want the video to stop, set the time for the slide to be hidden

trans-unit.resname: Click on %s to get the video current time.
trans-unit.source: Click on %s to get the video current time.

trans-unit.resname: see all the slides and answer all the questions
trans-unit.source: see all the slides and answer all the questions
trans-unit.target: mostra totes les diapositives i respon totes les preguntes

trans-unit.source: This video has no interactive elements.
trans-unit.target: El vídeo no té elements interactius.

trans-unit.source: Only one interactive video per page.

trans-unit.source: Please select a file or provide a valid video URL.

trans-unit.source: You can only add one Interactive Video iDevice per page.

trans-unit.resname: Create basic math operation games (addition, subtraction, multiplication, division). The student will have to guess the result, operator or an operand.
trans-unit.source: Create basic math operation games (addition, subtraction, multiplication, division). The student will have to guess the result, operator or an operand.

trans-unit.source: Please define the minimal value of the operand

trans-unit.source: Please define the highest value of the operand

trans-unit.resname: This software is provided as a preview and should not be distributed. It is under development and is subject to substantial change. Consider the included information incomplete and use it with caution.
trans-unit.source: This software is provided as a preview and should not be distributed. It is under development and is subject to substantial change. Consider the included information incomplete and use it with caution.
trans-unit.target: Aquest programari es proporciona com a vista prèvia i no s’ha de distribuir. Està en desenvolupament i està subjecte a canvis substancials. Considereu la informació inclosa com a incompleta i utilitzeu-la amb precaució.

trans-unit.resname: eXeLearning is a free software tool under the GNU Affero GPL that can be used to create educational interactive web contents. eXeLearning can generate interactive contents in different formats and it allows you to create easily navigable web pages. All the educational materials generated with eXeLearning can be exported in different digital formats, to be used independently or to integrate them into a LMS (Learning Management System) like Moodle.
trans-unit.source: eXeLearning is a free software tool under the GNU Affero GPL that can be used to create educational interactive web contents. eXeLearning can generate interactive contents in different formats and it allows you to create easily navigable web pages. All the educational materials generated with eXeLearning can be exported in different digital formats, to be used independently or to integrate them into a LMS (Learning Management System) like Moodle.
trans-unit.target: eXeLearning és una eina de programari lliure sota GNU Affero GPL que es pot utilitzar per crear continguts web educatius interactius. eXeLearning pot generar continguts interactius en diferents formats i permet crear pàgines web fàcilment navegables. Tots els materials educatius generats amb eXeLearning es poden exportar en diferents formats digitals, per ser utilitzats de manera independent o per integrar-los en un LMS (Sistema de Gestió d’Aprenentatge) com Moodle.

trans-unit.resname: This installation is a working fork of eXeLearning with local adaptations and custom developments.
trans-unit.source: This installation is a working fork of eXeLearning with local adaptations and custom developments.
trans-unit.target: Aquesta instal·lació és un fork funcional d'eXeLearning amb adaptacions locals i desenvolupaments personalitzats.

trans-unit.resname: Local customizations and additional iDevices in this fork are attributed to Juan José de Haro.
trans-unit.source: Local customizations and additional iDevices in this fork are attributed to Juan José de Haro.
trans-unit.target: Les personalitzacions locals i els iDevices addicionals d'aquest fork s'atribueixen a Juan José de Haro.

trans-unit.resname: Someone else is editing this page. Please wait until they finish before adding new iDevices.
trans-unit.source: Someone else is editing this page. Please wait until they finish before adding new iDevices.
trans-unit.target: Algú està editant aquesta pàgina. Si us plau, espera que acabi abans d’afegir nous iDevices.

trans-unit.resname: The tooltip will show the term and its definition.
trans-unit.source: The tooltip will show the term and its definition.
trans-unit.target: L'indicador de funció mostrarà el terme i la seva definició.
Taula amb capçaleres en les columnes
Taula amb capçaleres en les files

trans-unit.resname: Table with column and row headers
trans-unit.source: Table with column and row headers
trans-unit.target: Taula amb capçaleres en les columnes i files

trans-unit.resname: Mark all the options in the correct order and click on the 'Reply' button.
trans-unit.source: Mark all the options in the correct order and click on the 'Reply' button.
trans-unit.target: Marca totes les opcions en l'ordre correcte i fes clic a 'Respon'.

trans-unit.resname: Write the correct word or phrase and click on the 'Reply' button.
trans-unit.source: Write the correct word or phrase and click on the 'Reply' button.
trans-unit.target: Escriu la paraula o frase correcta i fes clic a 'Respon'.

trans-unit.resname: You have not passed this test. You should review its contents and try again. Do you want to repeat this activity?
trans-unit.source: You have not passed this test. You should review its contents and try again. Do you want to repeat this activity?
trans-unit.target: No has superat aquesta prova. Has de revisar els seus continguts i tornar-ho a intentar. Vols repetir aquesta activitat?

trans-unit.resname: The question marked as next in case of success does not exist.
trans-unit.source: The question marked as next in case of success does not exist.
trans-unit.target: La pregunta marcada com a següent en cas d'èxit no existeix.

trans-unit.resname: The question marked as next in case of error does not exist.
trans-unit.source: The question marked as next in case of error does not exist.
trans-unit.target: La pregunta marcada com a següent en cas d'error no existeix.

trans-unit.resname: You must indicate a title for this point.
trans-unit.source: You must indicate a title for this point.
trans-unit.target: Has d'indicar un títol per a aquest punt.

trans-unit.resname: You must mark a point on the map.
trans-unit.source: You must mark a point on the map.
trans-unit.target: Has de marcar un punt al mapa.

trans-unit.resname: You must draw an area on the map.
trans-unit.source: You must draw an area on the map.
trans-unit.target: Has de dibuixar una àrea al mapa.

trans-unit.resname: You must indicate one point at least.
trans-unit.source: You must indicate one point at least.

trans-unit.resname: You must close all the edited maps before saving the activity.
trans-unit.source: You must close all the edited maps before saving the activity.
trans-unit.target: Has de tancar tots els mapes editats abans de desar l'activitat.

trans-unit.resname: You must close the edited presentation before saving the activity.
trans-unit.source: You must close the edited presentation before saving the activity.
trans-unit.target: Has de tancar la presentació editada abans de desar l'activitat.

trans-unit.resname: There must be at least one slide in the presentation.
trans-unit.source: There must be at least one slide in the presentation.
trans-unit.target: Hi ha d'haver almenys una diapositiva a la presentació.

trans-unit.resname: Indicate, using commas, the correct order in which points must be clicked
trans-unit.source: Indicate, using commas, the correct order in which points must be clicked
trans-unit.target: Indica, usant comes, l'ordre correcte en què s'han de fer clic als punts

trans-unit.resname: Click on the active areas or image icons.
trans-unit.source: Click on the active areas or image icons.
trans-unit.target: Fes clic a les àrees actives o icones d'imatge.

trans-unit.resname: Percentage of visited contents necessary to be able to carry out the activity questionnaire
trans-unit.source: Percentage of visited contents necessary to be able to carry out the activity questionnaire
trans-unit.target: Percentatge de continguts visitats necessaris per poder realitzar el qüestionari de l'activitat

trans-unit.resname: Provide a word and its definition. May toggle between: 'Word starts' or 'Word contains', by clicking on %s
trans-unit.source: Provide a word and its definition. May toggle between: 'Word starts' or 'Word contains', by clicking on %s
trans-unit.target: Proporciona una paraula i la seva definició. Pots alternar entre: 'La paraula comença' o 'La paraula conté', fent clic a %s

trans-unit.resname: You must provide the time to view the solution
trans-unit.source: You must provide the time to view the solution
trans-unit.target: Has de proporcionar el temps per veure la solució

trans-unit.resname: Import .elpx, .elp, or editable .zip or .epub files. The imported content will be added after the last page of the current project.
trans-unit.source: Import .elpx, .elp, or editable .zip or .epub files. The imported content will be added after the last page of the current project.

Error inesperat en importar el fitxer.

trans-unit.resname: The number of attempts has to be bigger or equal to the number of phrases in the game. Use 0 for an unlimited number of attempts
trans-unit.source: The number of attempts has to be bigger or equal to the number of phrases in the game. Use 0 for an unlimited number of attempts
trans-unit.target: El nombre d’intents ha de ser més gran o igual que el nombre de frases del joc. Utilitza 0 per indicar un nombre il·limitat d’intents

trans-unit.resname: With fixed headers, the number of cards must be bigger than the number of columns
trans-unit.source: With fixed headers, the number of cards must be bigger than the number of columns
trans-unit.target: Amb capçaleres fixes, el nombre de targetes ha de ser més gran que el nombre de columnes

trans-unit.resname: Please select a text file (.txt), a JSON file (.json), or an XML(Moodle) file (.xml)
trans-unit.source: Please select a text file (.txt), a JSON file (.json), or an XML(Moodle) file (.xml)
trans-unit.target: Si us plau, selecciona un fitxer de text (.txt), un fitxer JSON (.json) o un fitxer XML (Moodle) (.xml)

trans-unit.resname: The question text and the formula should have the same variables
trans-unit.source: The question text and the formula should have the same variables
trans-unit.target: El text de la pregunta i la fórmula han de tenir les mateixes variables

trans-unit.resname: Select the correct options and click on the 'Reply' button.
trans-unit.source: Select the correct options and click on the 'Reply' button.

trans-unit.resname: The word cannot contain more than fourteen characters or white spaces
trans-unit.source: The word cannot contain more than fourteen characters or white spaces
trans-unit.target: La paraula no pot contenir més de catorze caràcters ni espais en blanc

trans-unit.source: You must select at least one group of elements

trans-unit.source: Your changes won\'t be saved until you click on "Save".

Si us plau, comprova l’horari de "Fi"

trans-unit.source: Indicate the character, object or solution to discover

trans-unit.source: You must indicate the number of points for each item to be assesed
trans-unit.target: Has d’indicar el nombre de punts per a cada ítem a avaluar
Si us plau, escriu la descripció del repte.

trans-unit.resname: Please write the title, description and solution of all the trials.
trans-unit.source: Please write the title, description and solution of all the trials.

trans-unit.source: You must provide a definition, an image, and/or an audio for the word
trans-unit.target: Has de proporcionar una definició, una imatge i/o un àudio per a la paraula.

trans-unit.source: The score can't be saved because this page is not part of a SCORM package
trans-unit.target: La puntuació no es pot desar perquè aquesta pàgina no forma part d’un paquet SCORM

trans-unit.source: You must specify a number of rows and columns between three and five
trans-unit.target: Has d’especificar un nombre de files i columnes entre tres i cinc

trans-unit.source: You must complete the text and add an image or video
trans-unit.target: Has de completar el text i afegir una imatge o un vídeo

trans-unit.resname: You can only import data from text or XML files for “connect with arrows” matching games.
trans-unit.source: You can only import data from text or XML files for “connect with arrows” matching games.
trans-unit.target: Només pots importar dades de fitxers de text o XML per als jocs d’aparellament "connecta amb fletxes".

trans-unit.resname: Are you sure you want to continue without including an Image Description? Without it the image may not be accessible to some users with disabilities, or to those using a text browser, or browsing the Web with images turned off.
trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to continue without including an Image Description? Without it the image may not be accessible to some users with disabilities, or to those using a text browser, or browsing the Web with images turned off.
trans-unit.target: Segur que vols continuar sense incloure una Descripció de la Imatge? Sense ella, la imatge pot no ser accessible per a alguns usuaris amb discapacitats, per a aquells que utilitzen un navegador de text, o per als que naveguen amb les imatges desactivades.

trans-unit.resname: You must select an image and text for this card
trans-unit.source: You must select an image and text for this card
trans-unit.target: Has de seleccionar una imatge i un text per a aquesta targeta

trans-unit.source: You must indicate a text or sound for this card

trans-unit.source: Type the right URL of a Youtube video
trans-unit.target: Introdueix l’URL correcte d’un vídeo de YouTube

trans-unit.source: The number of attempts has to be bigger or equal to the number of pairs in the game. Please select 0 for infinite an unlimited number of attempts
trans-unit.target: El nombre d’intents ha de ser més gran o igual que el nombre de parelles del joc. Selecciona 0 per a un nombre il·limitat d’intents.

trans-unit.resname: Choose a file or paste a link (URL)
trans-unit.source: Choose a file or paste a link (URL)

trans-unit.source: Please select the media file to edit it
trans-unit.target: Si us plau, selecciona el fitxer multimèdia per editar-lo

trans-unit.resname: Class added to the "CSS class" field.

trans-unit.resname: That content was created using the old formula editor.

trans-unit.target: Aquest contingut s’ha creat utilitzant l’antic editor de fórmules.

trans-unit.resname: Make it compatible with the new editor?
trans-unit.source: Make it compatible with the new editor?
trans-unit.target: Vols fer-lo compatible amb el nou editor?

trans-unit.resname: Done! Please select the LaTeX code that you want to edit.
trans-unit.source: Done! Please select the LaTeX code that you want to edit.

trans-unit.source: If you want to edit a previous code, please select it before opening the editor.

trans-unit.source: You can edit the mind map...

No s'han pogut desar les propietats.

trans-unit.source: Please write the abbreviation and its meaning.

trans-unit.source: The ACRONYM tag is not supported in HTML5.\n\nUse the ABBR tag instead?

trans-unit.source: Please enable JavaScript to play this game.

trans-unit.source: You can change it at any time.

trans-unit.source: Write the list of letters and/or numbers to choose from.

trans-unit.source: You may include capital letters or they can be automatically included.

trans-unit.resname: Formulas are rendered even if this is disabled. Enable this option to include the full MathJax library in exports (about 8 MB) for advanced features such as accessibility tools and contextual menus.
trans-unit.source: Formulas are rendered even if this is disabled. Enable this option to include the full MathJax library in exports (about 8 MB) for advanced features such as accessibility tools and contextual menus.

trans-unit.resname: Apply a global font to all content. Useful for accessibility and early literacy.
trans-unit.source: Apply a global font to all content. Useful for accessibility and early literacy.

trans-unit.source: They will be automatically redirected to the parent page.
trans-unit.target: ~Seran redirigits automàticament a la pàgina de nivell superior.

trans-unit.source: Preferences will be applied after refreshing the page.
trans-unit.target: ~Les preferències s'aplicaran després d'actualitzar la pàgina.

trans-unit.resname: Changes require a page reload to take effect. Please download your project first to avoid losing your work, then reload the page.
trans-unit.source: Changes require a page reload to take effect. Please download your project first to avoid losing your work, then reload the page.
trans-unit.target: ~És necessari recarregar la pàgina per aplicar els canvis. Descarrega el teu projecte primer per no perdre feina. Després recarrega la pàgina.

trans-unit.resname: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
trans-unit.source: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
trans-unit.target: ~Tens canvis sense guardar. Segur que vols sortir?
~El projecte no està preparat per a l'edició col·laborativa

trans-unit.resname: Your project is automatically saved in your browser. Use File > Export to download a copy.
trans-unit.source: Your project is automatically saved in your browser. Use File > Export to download a copy.
trans-unit.target: ~El teu projecte s'assembla automàticament al navegador. Utilitza Fitxer - Exportar per descarregar una còpia.

trans-unit.resname: Cannot save project to server because your storage quota has been exceeded. You can download the project locally.
trans-unit.source: Cannot save project to server because your storage quota has been exceeded. You can download the project locally.
trans-unit.target: ~No es pot desar el projecte al servidor perquè s'ha superat la teva quota d'emmagatzematge. Pots descarregar el projecte al teu equip.
~No s'ha pogut carregar l'API de YouTube

trans-unit.resname: The questions have been added successfully
trans-unit.source: The questions have been added successfully

trans-unit.resname: Microphone access was denied or unavailable.
trans-unit.source: Microphone access was denied or unavailable.
trans-unit.target: ~Accés al micròfon denegat o micròfon no disponible.

trans-unit.resname: This might not work in this ePub reader
trans-unit.source: This might not work in this ePub reader
trans-unit.target: ~Això podria no funcionar en aquest lector d'ePub

trans-unit.source: This activity does not work in ePub format
trans-unit.target: ~Aquesta activitat no funciona en format ePub

trans-unit.resname: The folder picker did not respond. This may happen when opening exported files directly from the filesystem (file:// protocol). Try opening the file through a local web server instead.
trans-unit.source: The folder picker did not respond. This may happen when opening exported files directly from the filesystem (file:// protocol). Try opening the file through a local web server instead.
trans-unit.target: ~El selector de carpetes no ha respost. Això pot passar en obrir arxius exportats directament des del teu equip (protocol file://). Intenta obrir l'arxiu a través d'un servidor.

trans-unit.resname: No files were returned by the folder picker. This is a known limitation when opening exported files with the file:// protocol in some browsers. Try using a different browser or opening the file through a local web server.
trans-unit.source: No files were returned by the folder picker. This is a known limitation when opening exported files with the file:// protocol in some browsers. Try using a different browser or opening the file through a local web server.
trans-unit.target: ~El selector de carpetes no ha trobat arxius. Aquesta és una limitació coneguda en obrir arxius exportats amb el protocol file:// en alguns navegadors. Intenta utilitzar un altre navegador o obrir l'arxiu a través d'un servidor web.

trans-unit.resname: Local mode: Due to browser security policy, you will need to select the folder from which you opened this file. On a web server this will not be necessary.
trans-unit.source: Local mode: Due to browser security policy, you will need to select the folder from which you opened this file. On a web server this will not be necessary.
trans-unit.target: ~Mode local: a causa de la política de seguretat del navegador, hauràs de seleccionar la carpeta des de la qual vas obrir aquest fitxer. En un servidor web això no serà necessari.
~Fes clic a "Una altra paraula" per continuar

trans-unit.resname: Your access to this project has been revoked.
trans-unit.source: Your access to this project has been revoked.
trans-unit.target: ~El teu accés a aquest projecte ha estat revocat.

trans-unit.resname: Create a new set without loading external files.
trans-unit.source: Create a new set without loading external files.
trans-unit.target: ~Crea un nou conjunt sense carregar fitxers externs.

trans-unit.resname: Your set is empty. Use the "+ Add Category" button above to create the first category.
trans-unit.source: Your set is empty. Use the "+ Add Category" button above to create the first category.
trans-unit.target: ~El teu conjunt està buit. Utilitza el botó "+ Afegir categoria" de dalt per crear la primera categoria.

trans-unit.resname: This set has unsaved changes. Close anyway?
trans-unit.source: This set has unsaved changes. Close anyway?
trans-unit.target: ~Aquest conjunt té canvis sense guardar. Tancar de totes maneres?
~Falta l'origen o l'origen no és vàlid.
~No es troba la finestra de destinació.

trans-unit.resname: Your set is empty. Start by adding a category.
trans-unit.source: Your set is empty. Start by adding a category.
trans-unit.target: ~El teu conjunt està buit. Comença afegint una categoria.

trans-unit.resname: Player compatible with .srt subtitles. Check only if using .srt subtitles.
trans-unit.source: Player compatible with .srt subtitles. Check only if using .srt subtitles.
trans-unit.target: ~Reproductor compatible amb subtítols SRT. Marca aquesta opció només si utilitzes subtítols SRT.

trans-unit.resname: You made %s errors. You have %s attempts left. Do you want to try again?
trans-unit.source: You made %s errors. You have %s attempts left. Do you want to try again?
trans-unit.target: ~Has comès %s errors. Tens %s intents restants. Vols provar-ho de nou?

trans-unit.resname: You must close the edited questionnaire before saving the activity.
trans-unit.source: You must close the edited questionnaire before saving the activity.
trans-unit.target: ~Has de tancar el qüestionari editat abans d'guardar l'activitat.

trans-unit.resname: YouTube videos cannot be embedded in preview mode.
trans-unit.source: YouTube videos cannot be embedded in preview mode.
trans-unit.target: ~Els vídeos de YouTube no es poden incrustar en visualització prèvia.

trans-unit.source: Hint or suggestion for the student

trans-unit.resname: Message shown when answer is correct

trans-unit.target: ~Missatge que es mostra quan la resposta és correcta

trans-unit.resname: Message shown when answer is wrong
trans-unit.source: Message shown when answer is wrong
trans-unit.target: ~Missatge que es mostra quan la resposta és incorrecta

trans-unit.resname: No indicators were selected for this activity.
trans-unit.source: No indicators were selected for this activity.
trans-unit.target: ~No s'han seleccionat indicadors per a aquesta activitat.

trans-unit.resname: Framework data could not be loaded. Please verify the data file is available.
trans-unit.source: Framework data could not be loaded. Please verify the data file is available.
trans-unit.target: ~No s'han pogut carregar les dades del marc. Verifica que l'arxiu de dades estigui disponible.

trans-unit.resname: Framework data is still loading. Please wait.
trans-unit.source: Framework data is still loading. Please wait.
trans-unit.target: ~Encara s'estan carregant les dades del marc. Si us plau, espera...

trans-unit.resname: Use filters, search, or fullscreen to explore the framework. Indicators remain selected while filtering.
trans-unit.source: Use filters, search, or fullscreen to explore the framework. Indicators remain selected while filtering.
trans-unit.target: ~Utilitza filtres, cerca o pantalla completa per explorar el marc. Els indicadors romanen seleccionats en filtrar.

trans-unit.resname: Unable to change framework. The previous data will remain loaded.
trans-unit.source: Unable to change framework. The previous data will remain loaded.
trans-unit.target: ~No s'ha pogut canviar el marc. Es mantindran les dades anteriors.
